studentManagement.unlinkConfirmSubtitle: This is a sensitive action. Please review the consequences below before proceeding.
studentManagement.unlinkWarningPoint1: The parent loses live access (tracking, notifications, driver contact).
studentManagement.unlinkWarningPoint2: The student will appear as "Unlinked by Admin" in the parent's app.
studentManagement.unlinkWarningPoint3: If this was the parent's only active student, their account enters a 30-day grace period before deletion.
studentManagement.unlinkWarningPoint4: The parent cannot re-link with a single tap — they must re-verify via National ID and OTP.
studentManagement.relinkConfirmSubtitle: The previously unlinked parent will be re-linked to this student
studentManagement.relinkInfo: Relinking will cancel any pending deletion schedule for the parent's account

TRIP_STARTED.title: Trip Started
TRIP_STARTED.body: The driver has started the bus trip. Be ready.

BOARDED_BUS_TO_SCHOOL.title: Boarded Bus
BOARDED_BUS_TO_SCHOOL.body: Your child has boarded the bus for school.

BOARDED_BUS_TO_HOME.title: Boarded Bus
BOARDED_BUS_TO_HOME.body: Your child has boarded the bus for home.

ARRIVED_SCHOOL.title: Arrived at School
ARRIVED_SCHOOL.body: Your child has safely arrived at school and exited the bus.

DID_NOT_BOARD.title: Did Not Board
DID_NOT_BOARD.body: Your child did not board the school bus this morning.

ARRIVED_HOME.title: Arrived Home
ARRIVED_HOME.body: Your child has safely arrived home.

NO_RECEIVER.title: No Receiver
NO_RECEIVER.body: No receiver was found for your child at home.

NO_BOARD_ALERT.title: Alert: Did Not Board
NO_BOARD_ALERT.body: Your child was on the bus this morning but did not board for the return trip.

ACCOUNT_UNLINKED.title: Account Unlinked
ACCOUNT_UNLINKED.body: The school administration has unlinked your account from your child.

BUS_STATUS_UPDATE.title: Bus Status Update
BUS_STATUS_UPDATE.body: Your child's status on the bus has been updated.
